original_image_tags: * Faded red "RECORDED" stamp with vertical index, overlaid by large handwritten "62-83894-55" in blue ink.
* Blue circular stamp: "AND INDEXED F.B.I." with handwritten "135" inside.
* Red ink stamp: "30 SEP 30 1947" with handwritten "25-2" below it.

elements.description: A typed US Government Office Memorandum form (Standard Form No. 64) dated August 8, 1947. It is addressed to Mr. Ladd from J. P. Coyne regarding 'UNKNOWN SUBJECTS; Raymond Edward Lane, Mrs. Laura Lane - Informants; FLYING DISC MISCELLANEOUS'. The document contains several handwritten annotations and stamps, including a signature in red ink, blue and red date stamps, and a list of names printed vertically on the right side.

judge.reason: Description A describes three specific stamp images with quoted text, while Description B describes a typed memorandum form with no images, indicating they are describing different visual content.
